targets.query:
from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and r._field == "Soc")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and r._field == "Odometer")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and r._field == "InsideTemp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and r._field == "OutsideTemp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and (r._field == "Latitude" or r._field == "Longitude"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and (r._field == "Soc" or r._field == "BatteryLevel"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and (r._field == "ACChargingPower" or r._field == "DCChargingPower"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and (r._field == "InsideTemp" or r._field == "OutsideTemp"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and r._field == "VehicleSpeed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "tesla")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vehicle" and r.vin == "${vin}" and r._field =~ /^TpmsPressure/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
